instructions.information: Worried about numbness and pain in hands.

Numbness and some pain in hands, mostly on the left hand but some on the right. Started probably a year ago. Dropped a boiling pot of pasta recently due to numbness. Increased phone usage, playing online poker a lot, holding phone over chest while lying down.

parameters.narrative: The patient experiences numbness and some pain in the hands, mostly on the left hand but also on the right. Symptoms started approximately a year ago. The patient recently dropped a boiling pot of pasta due to numbness. There is increased phone usage, including playing online poker frequently and holding the phone over the chest while lying down.
